title: Israeli Army Chief Places Forces on Heightened Readiness for Renewed Iran War
detail: Israeli army chief Eyal Zamir placed the military on heightened readiness for possible renewed war against Iran, signaling Israel has not ruled out returning to active hostilities despite the current ceasefire. The announcement underscores fragility in the ceasefire framework as US-Iran negotiations continue in Islamabad, and reflects Israel's separate military calculus — particularly regarding Hezbollah and Lebanon fronts.

media.caption: Israeli army chief Eyal Zamir declares heightened readiness as Iran ceasefire talks proceed

title: Iranian Authorities Urge Supporters to Maintain Street Presence Amid Ceasefire Talks
detail: Iranian authorities remain defiant amid the ongoing conflict, urging supporters to maintain street presence — indicating hardline factions are resisting any softening of Tehran's posture during ceasefire negotiations in Islamabad. The mobilization signals internal political pressure against diplomatic compromise, with hardliners seeking to constrain the negotiating room available to Iran's leadership.

media.caption: Iranian supporters rally in streets as authorities urge defiance during ceasefire negotiations
